{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mantle of the Hollow King
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Mantle of the Hollow King]] caught [[Malice]]'s arrow and redirected it toward [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
